description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat, multi-tiered roof featuring a large central skylight. The structure is composed of clean, geometric lines and large horizontal planes, with extensive use of glass in the form of wide, grid-patterned windows wrapping around the main facade and sides. The building sits on a rectangular grassy plot with a slightly raised base, and the front entrance is recessed beneath an overhanging roof section. The exterior walls are primarily white, contrasted by dark gray roofing and some accent panels. There are visible green elements, such as small planters or hedges, integrated into the design, and the overall appearance is sleek and contemporary. The rear and side elevations are more solid, with fewer windows and a more private, enclosed feel.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large grid windows, white walls, and a central skylight, set on a grassy plot. The design is sleek, geometric, and contemporary.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance, wide grid-patterned windows, and a prominent overhanging roof with a central skylight.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the extended roof, grouped windows, and a more solid wall section with fewer openings.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a mostly solid facade with minimal windows and a continuation of the flat roof design.
description_view_3: The right side view highlights additional grid windows and a side extension, with the roof's layered structure visible.
